title: [PATCH]: Added fallback and heuristic to the PR-UPDATES realtime.
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Backup brains for the hive
gist.blurb: Added model fallbacks to our realtime PR updates pipeline. If one model takes a nap, another steps in to keep the updates flowing.
gist.summary: Implemented model fallbacks for PR analysis, image generation, and snippet creation in the realtime social pipeline.
gist.impact: Ensures the automated social media updates continue running smoothly even if the primary AI models experience downtime.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about the social pipeline having a backup plan. Visual: The bee mascot (Polly) and the Monitor Robot working together. The robot has a backup battery or a secondary screen ready.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot working at a retro terminal. The robot holds a glowing backup battery while the terminal screen displays lime green (#ecf874) code. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
